creator: john@saltant.com
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

Just a friendly reminder to any committers who aren't up to their
eyeballs that ports/169168 is ready to go.

Please let me know if there is anything more I could do to facilitate
inclusion in the ports tree, or increase confidence in the quality of
the port.

Thanks,
John
